title: Add Crestbound TCG (Server Assistant) to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Crestbound TCG (Server Assistant)](https://serverassistant.wandweb.co) to games
- Run Crestbound TCG inside the Server Assistant Discord-bot portal, powered by Pollinations. Generate card art, menus, shop, packs, and soundtrack using FLUX and gen.pollinations.

Fixes #12166

gist.headline: Draw your next card
gist.blurb: Crestbound TCG just landed in the Greenhouse! Play this Discord-based trading card game where every card, menu, and soundtrack is generated on the fly using Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added Crestbound TCG to the community apps list, a Discord-based trading card game that uses Pollinations and FLUX to dynamically generate card art, menus, and soundtracks.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play Crestbound TCG through the Server Assistant Discord bot, experiencing a game built entirely on real-time AI-generated assets.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee playing a trading card game with the Monitor Robot. Glowing, magical trading cards spread across a cozy wooden table, representing the dynamically generated TCG assets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot playing a trading card game with a chunky robot companion who has a CRT monitor head. Glowing magical trading cards hover above a wooden table. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
